headline: McDonald’s Workplace Incidents Put Culture Risks And Investor Focus In Spotlight
summary: McDonald's is facing fresh scrutiny after an employee in California was seriously injured in a workplace violence incident involving a coworker. At the same time, the company is again under public pressure over workplace harassment issues in the UK that have already drawn significant attention. These developments raise questions about workplace safety, corporate culture and operational controls across McDonald's global footprint. For investors tracking NYSE:MCD, these events come as the...
